problem.title: Partition Array According to Given Pivot

approaches.title: Three-way stable partition
approaches.summary: Partitions elements into values less than, equal to, and greater than the pivot while preserving their relative order, then concatenates the groups.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Uses a preallocated output array with calculated insertion positions for each partition.
Refactors to collect less-than and greater-than values separately, count pivot values, and concatenate the groups more直接
